terms.description: The Local Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund used for disaster preparedness, mitigation, response, rehabilitation, and recovery.
The portion generally used for disaster prevention, mitigation, preparedness, rehabilitation, and recovery programs.
The standby portion intended for urgent disaster response and recovery needs.
The share of appropriation that has been spent.

content.sourceNote: Figures are based on the uploaded Aparri LDRRMF 2024 CSV and should be checked against the latest BLGF posting before formal use.
